ability.changed_survive_protocol.secrete: Spend a little hunger to coat the block face you are looking at with your latex.
Staying near the latex will stall your lucidity.
gamerule.csp:doLatexHeartInfestations.de: Allows CSP Latex Hearts to seed and grow in the world. Off by default.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartNewChunkSeeding.d: Allows new chunks to roll for Latex Heart placement after the chunk finishes loading.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartLoadedChunkSeedin: Allows rare Latex Heart placement attempts in already-loaded chunks near players.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartSpecialBlocks.des: Allows mature Latex Hearts to place crystals, pillars, and other stronger infestation blocks.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartMobSpawning.descr: Allows mature Latex Hearts to summon fitting Changed latex mobs nearby.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartSuppressNaturalCh: Suppress Natural Changed Spawns Near Hearts
Prevents natural Changed latex mob spawns on terrain owned by CSP Latex Hearts.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartNewChunkChance.de: One-in-N chance for a new chunk to seed a Latex Heart. Set to 0 to disable.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartLoadedChunkChance: One-in-N chance per loaded-chunk seeding roll near players. Set to 0 to disable.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartGrowthInterval.de: Ticks between growth attempts for each active Latex Heart. Lower values spread faster.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartMaxClaims.descrip: Maximum positions one Latex Heart can own. Set to 0 for no claim cap.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartMaxActivePerDimen: Maximum active Latex Hearts per dimension. Set to 0 for no active-heart cap.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartMaxNodes.descript: Maximum shield nodes one Latex Heart can maintain. Nodes must be broken before the heart.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartMaxNodeDistance.d: Maximum distance from a heart where shield nodes may spawn. Set to 0 for no distance cap.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartDecayInterval.des: Ticks between slow decay passes for latex owned by dead hearts. Set to 0 to disable decay.
Base ticks between mob spawn attempts for each mature Latex Heart. Higher values spawn fewer mobs.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartMobSpawnMinClaims: Latex Heart Mob Spawn Minimum Claims
Minimum owned positions required before a Latex Heart starts summoning mobs.
gamerule.csp:latexHeartMobSpawnCap.descr: Maximum living mobs tracked for each Latex Heart. Set to 0 to prevent heart mob summons.
block.changed_survive_protocol.dark_late: Claims nearby latex and slowly grows an infestation.
block.changed_survive_protocol.white_lat: Claims nearby latex and slowly grows an infestation.
block.changed_survive_protocol.latex_cen: Processes identified strands into cure doses or cultured strands.
item.changed_survive_protocol.latex_inhi: Suppresses active infection and slightly reduces it.
item.changed_survive_protocol.sampling_s: Cuts a raw sample from an infected human body.
item.changed_survive_protocol.raw_latex_: Analyze this in a microscope to identify the strain.
item.changed_survive_protocol.identified: A named strain sample for cure and stabilization work.
item.changed_survive_protocol.stabilizin: Used with an identified strand and latex feed to culture a stabilizing strain.
item.changed_survive_protocol.strand_cur: Reduces matching active infection; it will not undo a completed transfur.
item.changed_survive_protocol.cultured_l: Carry this while bonding with the matching latex form to build attunement.
item.changed_survive_protocol.stabilizat: Settles the matching current latex form permanently.
tooltip.changed_survive_protocol.coverag: Coverage only. No infection or lucidity effect.
tooltip.changed_survive_protocol.infecti: Infection only. No surface cleaning or untransfur effect.
tooltip.changed_survive_protocol.scalpel: Costs health and slightly lowers infection.
tooltip.changed_survive_protocol.permane: Permanent. This form will be restored after untransfur attempts.
tooltip.changed_survive_protocol.microsc: Input: raw latex sample or Changed latex syringe
tooltip.changed_survive_protocol.centrif: Additive: latex inhibitor for cure, stabilizing reagent for culture
Disinfectant: spray for cure; leave empty for culture
Latex feed: latex base, dark latex goo, or white latex goo
Output: cure doses or cultured strand
message.changed_survive_protocol.scalpel: Use a Changed syringe to sample a fully latex body
Too weak to draw a sample safely
message.changed_survive_protocol.cure.no: A cure dose cannot undo a completed transfur
message.changed_survive_protocol.cure.un: This cure dose has no identified strain
message.changed_survive_protocol.stabili: You must already be latex to stabilize this strain
This dose is not attuned to your current strain
Your latex form is already settled
Lucidity is too low to stabilize safely
message.changed_survive_protocol.microsc: Use a raw latex sample or Changed latex syringe
message.changed_survive_protocol.centrif: This strand has no identified strain
Needs latex feed, inhibitor, and disinfectant spray
Needs latex feed and stabilizing reagent
message.changed_survive_protocol.secrete: This form cannot secrete spreadable latex
death.attack.changed_survive_protocol.lu: %1$s lost control of their latex body
